The question is asking to determine which city has the stadium with the largest capacity. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "capacity" column in the order of "large to small" using the f_sort_column(capacity) operation. This will allow us to see the stadiums with the highest capacities first, helping us identify the city associated with the largest capacity stadium.
The stadium with the largest capacity is Stade de France with a capacity of 81,338, which is located in Paris. Therefore, Paris has the stadium with the largest capacity.
